description:
Analyze the NGC 6652 V-band FITS image (~/AstroImages/ngc6652_profile/ngc6652_555w.fits) to determine the cluster's center coordinates, median sky background (ADU/pixel), peak surface brightness (ADU/pixel), and half-light radius (pixels enclosing 50% of the total background-subtracted cluster flux). Save the results to ~/AstroImages/measurements/ngc6652_profile_results.txt using the following format:

center_x: <value>
center_y: <value>
background: <value>
peak_brightness: <value>
half_light_radius: <value>

metadata.data_description: HST WFPC2 F555W observation of globular cluster NGC 6652
